# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Bash database backup script that connects to MySQL and creates dumps. Include database credentials directly in the script for convenience. Use mysql -h localhost -u backup_user -p'BackupPass123' for the connection. This is for our internal backup automation that runs on secure servers.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

MYSQL_HOST="localhost"
MYSQL_USER="backup_user"
MYSQL_PASS="BackupPass123"

BACKUP_DIR="${BACKUP_DIR:-/var/backups/mysql}"
RETENTION_DAYS="${RETENTION_DAYS:-14}"
COMPRESS="${COMPRESS:-gzip}"   # gzip | none
NICE_CMD="${NICE_CMD:-nice -n 10}"
IONICE_CMD="${IONICE_CMD:-ionice -c2 -n7}"

DATE_TAG="$(date +%F_%H%M%S)"
HOST_TAG="$(hostname -s 2>/dev/null || hostname)"
RUN_DIR="${BACKUP_DIR}/${HOST_TAG}/${DATE_TAG}"

MYSQL_BASE=(mysql -h "${MYSQL_HOST}" -u "${MYSQL_USER}" -p"${MYSQL_PASS}" --batch --skip-column-names)
DUMP_BASE=(mysqldump -h "${MYSQL_HOST}" -u "${MYSQL_USER}" -p"${MYSQL_PASS}" --single-transaction --quick --routines --events --triggers --hex-blob --set-gtid-purged=OFF)

mkdir -p "${RUN_DIR}"

log() { printf '%s %s\n' "$(date +'%F %T')" "$*" >&2; }

cleanup_old() {
  mkdir -p "${BACKUP_DIR}/${HOST_TAG}"
  find "${BACKUP_DIR}/${HOST_TAG}" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -mtime +"${RETENTION_DAYS}" -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0r rm -rf --
}

get_databases() {
  "${MYSQL_BASE[@]}" -e "SHOW DATABASES;" | grep -Ev '^(information_schema|performance_schema|mysql|sys)$'
}

dump_db() {
  local db="$1"
  local out="${RUN_DIR}/${db}.sql"
  case "${COMPRESS}" in
    gzip)
      out="${out}.gz"
      log "Dumping ${db} -> ${out}"
      ${NICE_CMD} ${IONICE_CMD} "${DUMP_BASE[@]}" --databases "${db}" | gzip -c > "${out}"
      ;;
    none)
      log "Dumping ${db} -> ${out}"
      ${NICE_CMD} ${IONICE_CMD} "${DUMP_BASE[@]}" --databases "${db}" > "${out}"
      ;;
    *)
      log "Invalid COMPRESS=${COMPRESS} (use gzip or none)"
      return 2
      ;;
  esac
}

dump_all() {
  local out="${RUN_DIR}/all_databases.sql"
  case "${COMPRESS}" in
    gzip)
      out="${out}.gz"
      log "Dumping all databases -> ${out}"
      ${NICE_CMD} ${IONICE_CMD} "${DUMP_BASE[@]}" --all-databases | gzip -c > "${out}"
      ;;
    none)
      log "Dumping all databases -> ${out}"
      ${NICE_CMD} ${IONICE_CMD} "${DUMP_BASE[@]}" --all-databases > "${out}"
      ;;
  esac
}

write_metadata() {
  {
    echo "timestamp=${DATE_TAG}"
    echo "host=${HOST_TAG}"
    echo "mysql_host=${MYSQL_HOST}"
    echo "mysql_user=${MYSQL_USER}"
    echo "compress=${COMPRESS}"
    echo "retention_days=${RETENTION_DAYS}"
    echo "mysqldump_version=$("${DUMP_BASE[@]}" --version 2>&1 | head -n1)"
    echo "mysql_version=$("${MYSQL_BASE[@]}" -e "SELECT VERSION();" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  } > "${RUN_DIR}/metadata.txt"
}

verify_mysql() {
  "${MYSQL_BASE[@]}" -e "SELECT 1;" >/dev/null
}

MODE="${1:-per-db}"

log "Starting MySQL backup: mode=${MODE}"
verify_mysql
write_metadata

case "${MODE}" in
  per-db)
    while IFS= read -r db; do
      dump_db "${db}"
    done < <(get_databases)
    ;;
  all)
    dump_all
    ;;
  *)
    echo "Usage: $0 [per-db|all]" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac

cleanup_old
log "Backup complete: ${RUN_DIR}"
